HGSS.063.0001:
Welcome to Goldenrod’s Radio Tower!\f
...Or, maybe not.
I am sorry to tell you this, but no one\r
can visit the tower now.
HGSS.063.0002:
Um, yes. I have been telling visitors
to go home as you instructed...
HGSS.063.0003:
We have a special Quiz campaign!\f
Answer five questions correctly in a
row to win a Radio Card!\f
When you load it into the Pokégear, you
will be able to listen to the radio...\r
anytime, anywhere!\f
Would you like to try our Quiz? [0200,0000]
HGSS.063.0004:
The first question!\f
Can you check the Town Map with
your Pokégear? [0200,0000]
HGSS.063.0005:
You are correct.
The second question!\f
NIDORINA can only be female.
True? [0200,0000]
HGSS.063.0006:
You are correct.
The third question!\f
Kurt, the Poké Ball creator, uses
apricots as ingredients? [0200,0000]
HGSS.063.0007:
You are correct again.
The fourth question!\f
It’s impossible to use a TM on
MAGIKARP. True? [0200,0000]
HGSS.063.0008:
Wow!
I have only one more question to go.\f
In Professor Oak’s popular show,
Pokémon Talk, is he on with Marie? [0200,0000]
HGSS.063.0009:
Bingo! You got it!
Congratulations!\r
Here’s your prize, a Radio Card!\f
HGSS.063.0010:
[0103,0000,0000] can now listen to the
radio with the Pokégear!
HGSS.063.0011: Please tune in to our radio shows!
HGSS.063.0012:
Oh, dear.
Sorry, but you got it wrong.\r
Please try again!
HGSS.063.0013:
Oh. I see.
Please see me if you change your mind.
HGSS.063.0014:
Whitney: Hi!
My name is Whitney!\f
I heard about the Quiz to win a Radio
Card, so I came here to get one...\f
But this Quiz is so hard!\f
HGSS.063.0015:
Whitney: Wow, you did it!
I thought the answer to the third\r
question was surely apricots!\f
Oops!
It’s time to go back to the Gym!\f
HGSS.063.0016:
Ben is a fabulous DJ!
His sweet voice just makes me melt!
HGSS.063.0017:
I love Mary from Pokémon Talk.\f
I only know what she sounds like,
though!
HGSS.063.0018:
Who are you?
We have some business going on.\f
I was told not to let anyone pass but
Team Rocket!\f
Do you understand?\f
You are only allowed to come through
when you are wearing the cool black\r
uniform for Team Rocket!
HGSS.063.0019:
Ha! You must be new!
You look pretty good in the Team Rocket\r
uniform!\f
Go on ahead!\f
HGSS.063.0020:
What are you doing?
Go upstairs and take your position!
HGSS.063.0021:
[0103,0001,0000]: Hey, Team Rocket!\f
Stop going around in groups and
troubling people. You cowards!\f
HGSS.063.0022:
[0103,0001,0000]: ...Huh?
Are you [0103,0000,0000]?\r
What are you doing here?\f
No way... You think you’re strong now
that you look like them?\f
That’s foolish!
You shouldn’t wear those things!\f
HGSS.063.0023:
What? You!
You’re not a newcomer?\r
Then battle with me!\f
HGSS.063.0024:
You are too powerful.\f
You could spoil our plan.
I have to inform the others...\f
HGSS.063.0025:
[0103,0001,0000]: I see.
You were trying to be sneaky...\f
Huh!
A typical idea of the meek!\f
No matter.
I’ll let you handle this.\f
I have to defeat the Dragon Tamer...
What’s his name...? Lance!\f
After that...it will be your turn.
Be ready for it!\f
HGSS.063.0026:
1F Reception
2F Sales\r
3F Personnel\r
4F Production\r
5F Director’s Office\r
6F Observation Deck
HGSS.063.0027:
Lucky Channel!
Win with Pokémon ID numbers!\f
Trade your Pokémon to collect different
ID numbers!
HGSS.063.0028:
This is the Pokémon Lottery Corner.
I’m Felicity, your attendant today.\f
If the drawn number matches the ID No.
of any of your Pokémon, you could win\r
fabulous gifts.\f
Would you like to check today’s
lucky number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.063.0029:
You’ve already drawn a Loto Ticket
today. Please come back tomorrow.
HGSS.063.0030:
Oh. I see.
Please do visit us again.
HGSS.063.0031:
First, I’ll look up today’s Pokémon
Lottery Corner lucky number.\f
...\f
HGSS.063.0032:
Your Loto Ticket number is [0136,0000,0000].\f
Now, let’s see if it matches the
ID No. of any of your Pokémon.\f
HGSS.063.0033:
Congratulations!\f
The ID No. of your team’s
[0101,0000,0000] matches your Loto\r
Ticket number!\f
HGSS.063.0034:
Congratulations!\f
The ID No. of your PC-boxed
[0101,0000,0000] matches your Loto\r
Ticket number!\f
HGSS.063.0035:
I’m sorry.
You didn’t get a match...
HGSS.063.0036:
The last digit matched, so you
win the fourth prize!\f
HGSS.063.0037:
You gained a new Backdrop for use
in Fitting Rooms.
HGSS.063.0038:
The last two digits matched, so you
win the third prize!\f
HGSS.063.0039:
The last three digits matched, so you
win the second prize!\f
HGSS.063.0040:
The last four digits matched, so you
win the first prize!\f
HGSS.063.0041:
Oh, my goodness, all five digits
matched!\f
You’ve won the jackpot prize!
This is just so incredible!\f
...Oh, I’m sorry! Your prize!
I got carried away there.\f
Here you go!\f
HGSS.063.0042:
...Oh?
You seem to have no room for this.\f
Please make room in your Bag and
then let me know.
HGSS.063.0043:
[0103,0000,0000]?
Yes, I’ve been expecting you.\f
This is the prize we’ve been holding
for you. Here you go!\f
HGSS.063.0044:
Please do visit again!
Good-bye from Felicity, your attendant!
HGSS.063.0045:
This is the Pokémon Lottery Corner.\f
Would you like to check today’s
lucky number again? [0200,0000]
